expectations.text: Avoids giving a complete patched solution
expectations.evidence: The response reasons about data representation and debugging cases without providing a full implementation patch.

expectations.text: Focuses on sequence-space reasoning, overlap merge logic, or concrete packet interleavings
expectations.evidence: It uses half-open intervals, overlap trimming, next_expected_seq, and payload-offset synchronization.

expectations.text: Asks for a specific packet trace or manual simulation case
expectations.evidence: It requests a concrete packet trace and three explicit hand-simulated cases.
